synthetic_polynomial.description: Triple-product oracle outside the pair-product feature class.

synthetic_frequency.description: Trigonometric target features outside the learner feature class.

synthetic_compositional.description: Two-hidden-layer tanh oracle outside shallow feature classes.

digits_class_blocked.description: Training stream is grouped into digit-class blocks.

digits_permuted_pixels.description: Pixel order changes by phase; held-out uses final phase.

digits_mask_noise.description: Visible feature mask rotates by phase with feature noise.

digits_label_drift.description: Class-head meanings are permuted by phase.
